fields.name: changeRequest
fields.label: ✨ Want a change you can't make below? Ask here
fields.description: Describe anything you'd like changed that these controls don't let you do (a new kind of section, a custom layout, anything at all), then hit Save. It goes straight to Charlie and he'll take care of it. Clear this box once it's done. (Tip: after any Save, your live site updates in about 3 minutes.)

fields.name: colorTheme
fields.label: 🎨 Color theme
fields.description: Sets the colors across your whole site. Pick the mood you like.

fields.name: fontPairing
fields.label: ✍️ Fonts
fields.description: The lettering style for your headings and text.

fields.name: textSize
fields.label: 🔠 Text size
fields.description: Make everything a little smaller or bigger, all at once.

fields.name: sections
fields.label: 🧩 Sections (drag to reorder, switch to show/hide)
fields.description: Drag these into the order you want them on your page, and turn any of them off with the switch. Your top banner always stays first.

fields.name: tagline
fields.label: Your big headline
fields.description: The large line people see first at the top of the page. Keep it short.

fields.name: heroKicker
fields.label: The little line above your headline
fields.description: A short, warm intro — like “welcome to”.

fields.name: heroSub
fields.label: Your intro sentence
fields.description: One or two friendly sentences under the headline.

fields.name: heroImage
fields.label: Your main photo (top of the page)
fields.description: Click to upload. A tall (portrait) photo of you looks best here.

fields.name: aboutHeading
fields.label: About section — heading
fields.description: The title of your “about me” section.

fields.name: aboutImage
fields.label: Your About photo
fields.description: Click to upload a photo of you for the About section.

fields.name: aboutText
fields.label: Your story
fields.description: Tell people about you, all in this one box. Leave an empty line between paragraphs.

fields.name: recipes
fields.label: Your recipes
fields.description: Each recipe becomes a card on the homepage and gets its own page. Add a photo, ingredients and steps whenever you’re ready — anything you leave blank just won’t show. Use “+ Add” to make a new one, or drag to reorder.

fields.name: blurb
fields.label: Short description
fields.description: One or two sentences shown on the card.

fields.name: tag
fields.label: Little label (optional)
fields.description: A small tag on the card, like “Dinner” or “On repeat”.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Recipe photo (optional)
fields.description: Click to upload. A nice placeholder shows until you add one.

fields.name: serves
fields.label: Serves (optional)
fields.description: For example: “Serves 4”.

fields.name: time
fields.label: Time (optional)
fields.description: For example: “30 min”.

fields.name: ingredientsText
fields.label: Ingredients (optional)
fields.description: Type or paste them all in this one box — one ingredient per line. For a group title like “For the sauce”, put it on its own line ending with a colon (:).

fields.name: methodText
fields.label: Method / steps (optional)
fields.description: Type or paste the whole method in this one box — one step per line. Steps are numbered automatically. For a section title like “Prep your burger”, put it on its own line ending with a colon (:). After you Save, your live site updates in about 3 minutes.

fields.name: href
fields.label: Link to another site (advanced — usually leave blank)
fields.description: Only fill this in if you want this card to open another website (like an Instagram post) instead of its own recipe page.

fields.name: howtos
fields.label: How-to videos (kitchen basics)
fields.description: Your technique videos — how to medium dice a potato, dice an onion, fabricate a chicken. Each one gets its own spot on your How-To page, and any recipe that mentions the technique links to your video automatically. Use “+ Add” for each new video.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Technique name
fields.description: What you’re teaching, like “Medium dice a potato”. No need to type “How to” — the site adds it.

fields.name: videoUrl
fields.label: Video link
fields.description: Paste the link to your video — an Instagram reel, YouTube video, or TikTok. It plays right on the page. You can add the technique now and paste the link later.

fields.name: blurb
fields.label: Short description (optional)
fields.description: One or two sentences about the technique and when you use it.

fields.name: image
fields.label: Cover photo (optional)
fields.description: Shown on the card until someone plays the video.

fields.name: matchText
fields.label: Recipe words that should link here (optional)
fields.description: When a recipe of yours mentions these words, they automatically become a link to this video — one word or phrase per line, like “medium dice” or “diced potatoes”. Leave blank to just use the technique name above.

fields.name: workHeading
fields.label: Work-with-me — heading
fields.description: The title of the section about collaborating with you.

fields.name: workIntro
fields.label: Work-with-me — intro
fields.description: A short paragraph inviting brands and people to work with you.

fields.name: workCta
fields.label: Work-with-me — button text
fields.description: What the button says, like “Let’s work together”.

fields.name: workOfferingsText
fields.label: Ways people can work with you
fields.description: The list of things you offer — one per line in this box.

fields.name: statVideosOver1M
fields.label: How many videos have over 1 million views
fields.description: Counted automatically every day — this is a safety minimum. The site shows whichever is higher.

fields.name: shopHeading
fields.label: Shop section — heading
fields.description: The title of your shop section, like “Shop my kitchen”.

fields.name: shopIntro
fields.label: Shop section — intro
fields.description: A short line about what you share in your shop.

fields.name: shopEmbed
fields.label: Shop embed code (optional — shows your shop right on the page)
fields.description: To show your ShopMy shop directly on the page: in ShopMy open a collection → Settings & Sharing → Embeddable Components → copy the code → paste it here. Leave blank to show a button that opens your shop instead.

fields.name: emailGeneral
fields.label: Your email address
fields.description: Where people reach you. Used on the contact button and in the footer.

fields.name: socials
fields.label: Your social links
fields.description: Your profiles. For each one, paste the full web address (it starts with https://).

fields.name: label
fields.label: Platform name
fields.description: e.g. Instagram, TikTok, YouTube.

fields.name: handle
fields.label: Your handle
fields.description: e.g. @wickieskitchen.

fields.name: href
fields.label: Web address (URL)
fields.description: The full link, e.g. https://www.instagram.com/wickieskitchen

fields.name: name
fields.label: Your name
fields.description: Used in the page’s behind-the-scenes title. You rarely need to change this.

fields.name: brand
fields.label: Your brand name
fields.description: Like “Wickie’s Kitchen”. Shown in the top-left corner and the footer.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
